chapter_title.en: Chapter on a Woman Performing Hajj Without a Mahram or Guardian

text: 2910 - رُوِيَ عَنْ مُعَاوِيَةَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَلْمَرْأَةِ تَخْرُجُ إِلَى مَكَّةَ بِغَيْرِ وَلِيٍّ فَقَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ تَخْرُجُ مَعَ قَوْمٍ ثِقَاتٍ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2910 - It was narrated from Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar, who said:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a woman traveling to Mecca without a guardian.
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm if she travels with trustworthy people."
